name: realitytearalertdialog
title: Reality Tear Alert Dialog
description: RealityTearAlertDialog — A confirmation dialog that rips open the fabric of the UI. A glowing tear line splits the screen, sparks fly outward, and the dialog materializes from the void. Destructive actions deserve dramatic confirmation.
